query:
-- Check the UMass-Lowell vs UMBC game status
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, ncaaContestId, sortOrder, 
       publishedToFeed, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       spreadAwayBetsPct, totalOverBetsPct, mlAwayBetsPct, gameStatus
FROM games 
WHERE ncaaContestId = '6594185' OR (awayTeam = 'umass_lowell' AND homeTeam = 'umbc');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute -- Check the UMass-Lowell vs UMBC game status
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, ncaaContestId, sortOrder, 
       publishedToFeed, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       spreadAwayBetsPct, totalOverBetsPct, mlAwayBetsPct, gameStatus
FROM games 
WHERE ncaaContestId = '6594185' OR (awayTeam = 'umass_lowell' AND homeTeam = 'umbc');
